alkylation concentration: alkylation to a final concentration of 55 mM
cleavage agent: One microgram of trypsin was added, and digestion was performed for 8 h
collision energy: Tandem-MS experiments were performed using higher energy collision dissociation at a collision energy of 34%
fragmentation method: Tandem-MS experiments were performed using higher energy collision dissociation
instrument: on a Easy nLC-1200 connected to a Exploris 480
reduction reagent: TCEP [Tris(2-carboxyethyl)phosphine hydrochloride; Thermo Fisher Scientific] was added to the samples
reduction concentration: TCEP was added to the samples to a final concentration of 10 mM
